examples: The withered oak leaf in the book here recalled the friend, the schoolfellow, who was to be his friend for life.
I'm helping this schoolfellow of mine.
We used to give a lift in our carriage to this schoolfellow and author who is also a friend of ours.
By contrast, Widmerpool, his fat and pompous schoolfellow who is unexpectedly successful in adult life, is a great comic creation.
